no gym/workout framing (this is a food brand)

positioning: Authentic Najdi home-food delivered with care and quality.
angles_to_pursue: Highlight the convenience and quality of delivery service with a focus on packaging and taste.
Share stories or testimonials of customer satisfaction emphasizing the taste and quality of the food.
Create content around traditional Najdi recipes and the cultural heritage of the dishes offered.
Engage with the audience by addressing common delivery concerns and showcasing improvements.
Feature behind-the-scenes content about the preparation and quality control processes.
research_requests: Investigate customer preferences for specific Najdi dishes to tailor offerings.
Analyze competitor delivery strategies to identify areas for improvement.
Study cultural nuances in Najdi food marketing to enhance brand positioning.
